canonical_answer: A bald man wearing a dark blue polo shirt sits behind a table covered with a white cloth. Several small glass bowls containing ingredients like white powder and yellow corn are arranged in front of him. A green glass bottle stands to the left, while a white chef's hat rests on the right side of the table. The man gestures with his hands while facing forward.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A large clear glass mixing bowl sits behind a row of small glass bowls containing shredded yellow cheese, chopped onions, and red pieces. A whole brown potato rests on a white plastic cutting board near the center. A green glass bottle labeled extra virgin olive oil is positioned on the left side of the white textured tablecloth. A silver fork lies on the cutting board.

question: Describe the actions and hand positions of the man throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a bald man sits behind a table with ingredients; at 4s, his hands are clasped together on the table; at 6s, hands move from an open gesture to being clasped; at 18s, he gestures with both hands in front of his chest.
